caption: The video features a man seated at a desk in a studio setting, likely for a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a white cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with gold lettering that reads "Boss." The man is holding a smartphone in his hands, appearing to be engaged with it while speaking into a microphone positioned in front of him. The background includes a banner with the text "Unique Hustle" and stars, as well as a sign that says "Where Bosses Talk!" The overall atmosphere suggests a professional yet casual environment where business or entrepreneurial topics might be discussed. Another person partially enters the frame from the right side, indicating interaction or assistance during the recording.
